user.title: Solar and battery economy
user.description: All price fields should be entered in öre/kWh excluding VAT. Example: enter 5 for 5 öre/kWh. Sensor results are displayed in SEK/kWh.

data.name: Name
data.buy_price_mode: First, specify how you purchase your electricity
data.buy_price_adjustment: Markup/Discount/Flat rate for purchased electricity (öre/kWh, excluding VAT)
data.sell_price_mode: How is the selling price calculated?
data.sell_price_adjustment: Markup/Discount/Flat rate for sold electricity (öre/kWh, excluding VAT)
data.grid_import_mode: How is the grid import fee calculated?
data.grid_import_fixed: Fixed part of the grid import fee (öre/kWh, excluding VAT)
data.grid_import_percent_of_spot: Variable part of the grid import fee (% of spot price)
data.grid_benefit_spot_percent: Grid benefit percentage of spot price
